creator: Anokolisa
rules: Do not treat the source sheets as uniform 32px tile atlases.
Environment tilesets contain connected 16px autotile shapes and require mask decoding or deliberate composition.
Furniture and static-prop sheets are irregular packed source sheets and require named crop rectangles.
Visual footprint, collision footprint, anchor, layer, and interaction point must be stored separately.
Mockups are visual references only and must never be cropped as production assets.
Only selected runtime derivatives may enter the public repository; never commit the complete pack or Aseprite sources.

autotile.recommended_use: reference and source material for a project-specific 32px environment atlas

interior_structure.recommended_use: manual room composition on a 16px subgrid

furniture.recommended_use: extract selected named objects with explicit crop and anchor metadata

player.recommended_use: strong candidate after 64px frame, facing, equipment-layer, and anchor mapping

npc.recommended_use: good for selected residents after animation and direction mapping

enemy.recommended_use: good for skeleton and orc families after exploration/tactical scale review

trees.recommended_use: strong candidate with trunk-only collision and foreground canopy rendering

stations.recommended_use: selected crafting and cooking stations with explicit footprints and interaction points

full_catalog: Run tools/catalog_pixel_crawler.py against a locally owned ZIP to generate the complete 181-file manifest and labeled previews.
